expectations.text: Output contains a Summary section with current gap, recommended bundle type, top 3 actions, and metrics to watch
expectations.evidence: Summary section at end; gap/type/actions in narrative; metrics in 'What to measure' table.

expectations.text: Output defines a bundle that includes foundation + beauty sponge + setting spray with a clear name and one-line value
expectations.evidence: Complete the Look / Complete the Look Bundle; foundation + sponge + setting spray in one click.

expectations.text: Output includes primary CTA wording such as 'Add complete look to cart' or 'Get the set' and secondary option to add single item only
expectations.evidence: "Add Complete Look" or "Add Full Routine"; single button for full set.

expectations.text: Output specifies PDP placement (above the fold, one-click add set) and that single-item option remains visible
expectations.evidence: Below main Add to Cart, one button 'Add Complete Look'; show on all three PDPs.

expectations.text: Output includes at least AOV, bundle attach rate, and conversion as metrics to measure
expectations.evidence: Bundle add-to-cart rate, bundle conversion rate, AOV with vs without bundle.

expectations.text: Output states no discount and frames value as convenience (not price savings)
expectations.evidence: Avoid 'Value Bundle,' 'Save Now'; convenience-only bundle, no discount.
